system.description:
When you **_have a quiet stretch of time at home and XP equal to (or greater than) 6 + twice your current level_**, follow these steps:

- Subtract 6 + twice your current level from your XP.
- Increase your level by 1.
- Choose a new move from your playbook, or an insert class that you've unlocked.
- If you are the Blessed (or have a sacred pouch) and your new level is even, increase your maximum Stock by 1.
- If you are the Lightbearer (or have Invoke the Sun God) and your new level is even, choose a new Invocation.
- Review your Instinct and Appearance. Change anything that no longer applies. Feel free to make up new options.
